master_file.title: Master File
master_file.text: Upload a Network Sketcher master file ([MASTER]*.xlsx or [MASTER]*.nsm) by dragging and dropping it here, or click to browse. Uploaded .xlsx files are automatically converted to the .nsm format used internally. You can also create a new empty master file by clicking 'Create New Master File'.

available_outputs.title: Available Outputs
available_outputs.text: Select the outputs you want to generate. Check/uncheck items individually, or use 'Select / Deselect All'. Click 'Generate Selected' to generate all checked items, or click the 'Generate' button next to an individual item. After generation, Preview and Download buttons will appear.

update_master.title: Update Master
update_master.text: Paste CLI commands generated by an LLM from the AI Context file. Each line is executed against the current master file. Supported commands include 'add', 'delete', 'rename', and 'show'. Commands starting with 'export' are skipped. After execution, the Available Outputs list is refreshed with the updated master file.

cli_commands.title: CLI Commands
cli_commands.text: Enter Network Sketcher CLI commands here, one per line. You can paste commands generated by an LLM, or type them manually. Click 'Run' to execute all commands against the current master file. Supported commands: 'add', 'delete', 'rename', and 'show'. Commands starting with 'export' are automatically skipped.

llm_prompt.title: LLM Prompt
llm_prompt.text: Describe the network changes you want in natural language (e.g., 'Add a router R-5 in area DC-TOP1'). This text is appended to the AI Context when copied. Buttons: 'Copy & Open LLM' copies the AI Context + prompt to clipboard and opens your LLM in a new tab. 'Copy' copies to clipboard only. 'Download' downloads the combined text as a file. If the AI Context has not been generated yet, it will be generated automatically on the first click.

create_new_master.title: Create New Master File
create_new_master.text: Creates a new empty master file with the default template. The file is automatically loaded and analyzed so you can start building your network design from scratch. Use the Update Master section with AI-generated commands to add devices, links, and areas.
